title: Thief In The Night
content:
Last night a thief came to me
        And struck at me with something dark.
    I cried, but no one could hear me,
        I lay dumb and stark.

    When I awoke this morning
        I could find no trace;
    Perhaps 'twas a dream of warning,
        For I've lost my peace.
meaning:
D. H. Lawrence (David Herbert Richards)'s contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Thief In The Night"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
